etymology.description: Depicts leaves growing from a tree (original form of 葉(葉) (yè, "leaf"))
etymology.interpretation: Depicts leaves on a branch, representing both the specific physical forms of 'leaf' as well as the larger conceptual category of things that are flat like leaves. This intuitive extension made it a fitting choice to also represent the concept of 'flat' due to the physical characteristic of flatness associated with leaves.
